item.text: I’m going to scan `crates/*/src/**` for actual `ToolContext` struct-literal construction sites, then verify each match in-file so we only return production files that truly construct it.
I found initial candidates and now I’m validating them one by one to exclude non-construction matches (like signatures) and catch any struct-update variants such as `..ToolContext::default()`.
